title.pt: Clean Architecture na pratica: como estruturei o backend da AlttabCorp
title.en: Clean Architecture in practice: how I structured AlttabCorp's backend

excerpt.pt: Um walkthrough completo de como apliquei Clean Architecture com Node.js e TypeScript em producao — decisoes, trade-offs e o que mudaria hoje.
excerpt.en: A complete walkthrough of how I applied Clean Architecture with Node.js and TypeScript in production — decisions, trade-offs, and what I would change today.
